title: Reporting export creeps into analytics surface
body: Spec includes a CSV export with computed aggregates that duplicate the analytics service. Either remove the aggregates or call the analytics API rather than recomputing.

title: Admin role check duplicates the auth service
body: Spec re-implements an admin-role check inline; that responsibility lives in the auth service. Call the existing authorization endpoint instead.

title: Export over 1M rows has no streaming or chunking story
body: Spec describes a single-shot export endpoint; for accounts with >1M rows the response will exceed memory and timeout budgets. No chunking, streaming, or async-export fallback is described.

title: Behavior on deleted-but-referenced record undefined
body: When a record is soft-deleted but still referenced by an export job in flight, the spec does not say whether the export includes the record, omits it silently, or returns an error.

title: Spec uses 'export' to mean three different things
body: The word 'export' refers to the CSV download, the scheduled report job, and the data-warehouse sync — three different surfaces with different semantics. Pick distinct names per surface.
